feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Embed custom BTP workzone UI5 app in S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I was wondering whether it was possible to embed a BTP workzone app in S/4HANA Public Cloud? We have customers who are on S/4HANA Public Cloud but have no reason aside from one app to make use of BTP workzone. Is it possible to embed a BTP workzone app to Public Cloud so that users don't need to navigate OR be redirected to workzone for the use of that one app?

I'm aware of the fact that you can create custom tiles which point to apps on BTP workzone, but these will redirect the user to the BTP workzone which in the case of our customers is bothersome for one single app.

 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Assign Multiple Cost Centers to a Personnel Number in S/4HANA Public Cloud 2502
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud release 2502 and I would like a clarification regarding personnel cost management in project-based scenarios.

We are implementing the following standard Scope Items (No Project-Based Services):
4I9 - Project Control - Sales;
1NT - Period-End Closing - Finance;
1Q4 - Time Recording;
4RF - Project Control - Resourcing and Procurement;

We have the requirement to allocate a single Personnel Number to multiple Cost Centers, considering that employees can work on different activities or projects.

Important constraint: The use of the Manage Direct Activity Allocation app (ID F3697A) is excluded from our scenario. We are looking for an alternative approach, fully aligned with the standard functionalities of the above-mentioned Scope Items.

My questions are:

1. If a Personnel Number can only be linked to one Cost Center in the master data, and given that timesheet postings require alignment between the Personnel's Cost Center and the project's Cost Center, is there any standard approach within Public Cloud (using Scope Items like 4I9, 4RF, or 1Q4) to enable a resource to work on projects with different Cost Centers, or must this be handled solely through master data changes?

2. What are SAP’s recommended best practices to allocate personnel costs to multiple Cost Centers or WBS Elements in a Public Cloud environment, without using custom developments and without relying on the Manage Direct Activity Allocation app (F3697A)?

Any help or guidance on this topic would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Best Approach ABAP BTP and SAP S/4 hana Public Clouc Integration
entry.content:
HI Guys, i would like to know that is the best approach for followiung scenarion:

Im devoping a RAP application on ABAP BTP (header/item), during save/post i will call and API on my public cloud to create a Document.

On my Header/Items i have standart fields like Company(Bukrs), Mateiral(MATNR), Account(HKONT).

What is the best approach to retrieve search helps for that fields based on my backend sap s/4hana Public Cloud System?

thanks

entry.title: Miss match in catalogs and apps between starter and Dev system for the same scope item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I see the difference in the catalogs and application counts for the same scope item activated in Starter and Development systems.

'IAM information system' in Starter shows more Apps/catalogs. But in Development it is missing some of these catalogs/Apps for the same scope item. Some of these applications presented to the clients during workshops in Starter system are now not available in Development.

Apart from this I have faced the scenario where I cannot see/access/run few 'standard applications' present in the Administrator role even though I have the access. I can see these apps in the 'IAM information system' but cannot run/execute or find the app in app finder.

Can you please assist me with the possible reason for this?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Security 

Regards,

Inchara BK

entry.title: Can you prevent an order from being created when VPRS is zero?
entry.content: When creating a PO or Sales Order and the VPRS has a value of zero can you have the error message stop the creation of the new order?

entry.title: S4/HANA Public Cloud Mass Change Task Lists and Operations
entry.content: What is the application or transaction for Mass Changing Data on Task Lists and their Operations in SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Create Product with Generic Material type from soap
entry.content:
I want to create product with Generic Material type by using the api. 

 

I have searched that we can create with "Product Master - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud ". 

But when I create using that api, it shows below error message. 

My xml is like below. 

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global" xmlns:gdt="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal/GDT" xmlns:yy1="http://SAPCustomFields.com/YY1_">
<soap:Header/>
<soap:Body>
<glob:ProductMDMBulkReplicateRequestMessage>
<MessageHeader>
<ID>0894EF4591011EDAB4A9AE3D29FAD840</ID>
<UUID>0894ef45-9101-1eda-b4a9-ae3d29fad840</UUID>
<CreationDateTime>2025-06-25T10:23:00Z</CreationDateTime>
<SenderBusinessSystemID>ABC_910</SenderBusinessSystemID>
<RecipientBusinessSystemID>XYZ_002</RecipientBusinessSystemID>
</MessageHeader>
<ProductMDMReplicateRequestMessage>
<MessageHeader>
<ID>0894EF4591011EDAB4A9AE3D29FAF840</ID>
<UUID>0894ef45-9101-1eda-b4a9-ae3d29faf840</UUID>
<CreationDateTime>2025-06-25T10:23:00Z</CreationDateTime>
<SenderBusinessSystemID>ABC_910</SenderBusinessSystemID>
<RecipientBusinessSystemID>XYZ_002</RecipientBusinessSystemID>
</MessageHeader>
<Product>
<ProductInternalID>CANDY3</ProductInternalID>
<UnformattedProductInternalID>SOAP_DEMO_101</UnformattedProductInternalID>
<ProductTypeCode>FERT</ProductTypeCode>
<IndustrySectorCode>M</IndustrySectorCode>
<DivisionCode>00</DivisionCode>
<ProductGroup>R1161003</ProductGroup>
<BaseMeasureUnitCode>PC</BaseMeasureUnitCode>
<Description actionCode="04">
<Description languageCode="EN">Demo Product2</Description>
</Description>
</Product>
</ProductMDMReplicateRequestMessage>
</glob:ProductMDMBulkReplicateRequestMessage>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

 

Could you please help me guide with the xml code to create product data? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Movement Type to Good Issue Block Stock with Profit Segment Field (291)
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Is there any movement type that allows us to 'Good Issue' - Block stock with a field profit segment, such as 291? 

Regards,

Melani Fatimah

FIN Profitability Analysis EWM - Goods Movement

entry.title: SO is confirmed when PO is created, not confirmed
entry.content:
Hi,

Earlier the behaviour in the system has been that the Sales order is confirmed (the output gets the status Completed) when the related PO (CBAB or CB1 item category) is confirmed. But since the last release the behaviour has changed, so now the sales order is confirmed as soon as the PO is created.

This is not what we want. How can we change it back to the original behaviour?

Kind Regards,

Cecilia

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType' in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team, 

I have created a Iflow, in which i have to patch all the entities with dynamic values for Business Partner. The flow is "Salesforce to CPI to SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud"

When i got the Salesforce payload, i tried to patch the first entity called "Business Partner"  got 204 response and when i tried to patch for Second entity "A_BusinessPartnerAddress" getting error(With same iflow).

I have gone through Batch process also,  followed by multiple blog 
blog1: https://medium.com/@vothedung91/sap-cpi-batch-processing-with-multiple-entities-220395b075a5

blog2: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/batch-request-with-patch-operation-on-multiple-functionally-related-entity/ba-p/13562530

Error: 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/020</code>
<message xml:lang="en">Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType'</message>
<innererror>
<application>
<component_id>LO-MD-BP</component_id>
<service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
<service_id>API_BUSINESS_PARTNER</service_id>
<service_version>0001</service_version>
</application>
<transactionid>69c60bac5af14a7399ad962d3b346d0c</transactionid>
<timestamp>20250626090941.9387880</timestamp>
<Error_Resolution>
<SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
<SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
</Error_Resolution>
<longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_BusinessPartnerAddressType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
<errordetails>
<errordetail>
<ContentID/>
<code>/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION</code>
<message>Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType'</message>
<longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_BusinessPartnerAddressType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
<propertyref/>
<severity>error</severity>
<target/>
<transition>false</transition>
</errordetail>
</errordetails>
</innererror>
</error>

iflow information : Used  "Content Modifer- to set-up the structure, based on XSD" --> "request-reply- ODatav2 Adapter(receiver) patch operation & selected all the field in "A_BusinessPartnerAddress entity" deployed it and triggered through Postman tool , got the error as response. 

Note: When i tried with default values its updating  successfully, when i tried to set values based on Properties then getting error.

Team, suggest any resolution to fix this.

Thanks,
Mansoor Basha

entry.title: S4/HANA Cloud - How to block Customers and Supplier from posting.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm working on a project in S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition and I need to block suppliers and customers from posting. I found a Business Object that maintains Business Partners, but it doesn't have a 'Posting Block' option. The closest solution I've found is an ODATA V2 API that has this option within its structure. I would prefer doing this with a Business Object; do you know if there is one that can do the job?


Business Object doc link: https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_BUSINESSPARTNERTP_3

ODATA V2 API doc link: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/overview


Kind Regards,
Marcelo Romeiro

entry.title: How to Assign Business Partner to Communication System in S/4HANA Public Cloud Using CBO or ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is it possible to assign a Business Partner to a Communication System using Custom Business Object (CBO) or ABAP (via In-App Extensibility)?

If so, what is the recommended approach or workaround to achieve this via coding?

Appreciate any guidance or examples.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: DRC
entry.content: I just want know is there any difference about DRC function on public cloud with private cloud ？

entry.title: PCE edition EPIC
entry.content: Are there anyone can answer my question? If we want to use EPIC function for cash management on PCE (SAP Private cloud edition) , do we need to buy extra licence  ?

entry.title: Unable to mass update product master data
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

We tried to perform a mass update of product master data using the "Manage Product Master Data" app, but we encountered an error message : 


The error message appears when we select the relevant products and click on the "Mass Processing" button.

Could you please advise ? 

Thank your for your help

entry.title: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Object Type DRAS not permitted
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have created an access control (define accesspolicy) on SAP S/4 Public Cloud. It works perfectly but I am not able to release the the task to which the access control belongs.

I get the following error: "Object DRAS ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER is not permitted. Object type DRAS cannot be transported."

ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER looks like this:

define accesspolicy ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER {
    @EndUserText.label: 'Business Partner of User'
    define aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER as
        select from ZI_BusinessUser with user element UserID
            {
                BusinessPartner //bypass when = 'bypass_value'
            }
            
}

This way I am able to define a role which checks for the business partner number of the logged on user:

@MappingRole: true
define role ZSOMEROLE {
    grant
        select
            on
                ZSOMECDSVIEW
                    where
                     CratedBy = $session.user or
                     (_SomeAssociation.BusinessPartnerId ) = aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER 
                     ;
}

 

Any help is very appreciated. I guess I will need to raise a SAP incident for this.

Thank you
Daniel

entry.title: TCS Configuration for Scrap Sales in India (SAP Public Cloud) – Threshold Based Rate Application
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We need guidance on the complete configuration steps for calculating TCS (Tax Collected at Source) on scrap sales in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – India localization.

Our requirement is as follows:

  • 0.1% TCS should apply when the customer crosses the ₹50 lakhs threshold in the financial year.

  • 1% TCS should apply from the first scrap sale if no PAN is available (i.e., no threshold consideration).

  • This TCS should be calculated in the scrap sales order accordingly.

Kindly provide the detailed configuration steps, including:

  • Relevant Tax Code / Condition Type settings

  • Customer master data changes (if any)

  • Threshold control setup

  • Assignment in tax procedure or SSCUI details (if applicable)

This is critical for compliance and we request your urgent help.

Thanks & regards,
Vishal

entry.title: SAP DRC automation public cloud Netherlands
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are currently activating/configuring DRC in SAP public cloud.
In the Netherlands we can use this for automatic filing of VAT return and ECLS.

To enable this we need to provide an authentication file provided by a Trust Service Provider. But it is not clear to me which certificate is needed.
Any idea which one is needed?
Maybe there are more, but if I check the website of the RDI and select the link to the trusted providers I see a few "certificates" mentioned:
QeRDS
QCert for ESig
QCert for ESeal
QWAC
QTimestamp

Appreciate your support.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to view audit logs ?
entry.content:
We need to identify how to view audit logs for changes made by super users (administrator users) in SAP, or, failing that, have a record to review changes made by administrator users.
Please tell us how we obtained this information.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Production Schedule Profile field is not visible in Product Master Data App
entry.content:
We are facing issue where we are unable to maintain "Production Schedule Profile" field in Manage Product Master Data App. 

 

How can we add it ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
